title: AXDropZoneDropEvent
description: Event emitted when a draggable element is dropped into a drop zone.

props.name: sender
props.description: The drop zone directive that emitted the event. Inherited from NXEvent.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native mouse event that triggered the drop. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.

props.name: dropped
props.description: The draggable element that was dropped into the zone.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the event with inherited members expanded.
